title: How to Delete Your BuyAndScrap.com Account: A Simple Guide
metaDescription: Quickly delete your BuyAndScrap.com account. Follow our simple, step-by-step guide to remove your profile and data. Learn exactly how do I delete my account today.
targetKeyword: how do i delete my account
content:
To delete your BuyAndScrap.com account, simply log in, navigate to 'Account Settings', and find the 'Delete Account' option. Follow the on-screen prompts to confirm your decision. This guide explains exactly **how do I delete my account** step-by-step, ensuring your data is handled correctly and securely.

## Deleting Your BuyAndScrap.com Account

Sometimes, account deletion is necessary. You might have found your ideal car on BuyAndScrap.com, or perhaps successfully sold your old motor. Whatever your reason, we make it straightforward to manage your data. We respect your choice. If you're still exploring options, you can always [Browse Cars](/cars). Or, if you have a vehicle to sell, visit our [Sell Your Car](/sell) page.

## How Do I Delete My Account on BuyAndScrap.com?

Deleting your account is a straightforward process. It gives you full control over your personal information. Here are the simple steps to follow:

1.  **Log In to Your Account.** Go to BuyAndScrap.com and log in using your registered email and password.
2.  **Access Account Settings.** Click on your username or profile icon. This is usually found in the top right-hand corner of the website. Select 'Account Settings' or 'Profile'.
3.  **Find the Deletion Option.** Look for a link or button labelled 'Delete Account' or 'Close Account'. It's often located under 'Privacy' or 'Security' sections.
4.  **Confirm Your Decision.** Follow the on-screen prompts to finalise the deletion. You may need to re-enter your password to verify your identity.

Once confirmed, your account deletion is processed. If you struggle to find this option, please [contact our support team](/contact-us). They are happy to help guide you.

## What Happens When You Delete Your Account?

After you delete your BuyAndScrap.com account, your personal profile and any active listings are removed. Most associated data is also erased from our active databases. We do retain some data for essential legal and regulatory reasons, as detailed in our [Privacy Policy](/privacy-policy). Your personal identity is anonymised wherever possible.

## Frequently Asked Questions (FAQs)

### Can I temporarily deactivate my BuyAndScrap.com account instead?
No, we do not currently offer a temporary deactivation feature. If you wish to take a break, you can simply stop using your account. It will remain dormant until you decide to return.

### What information does BuyAndScrap.com retain after deletion?
We retain certain data solely for necessary legal and regulatory compliance. This ensures we meet our obligations. All personal identification is anonymised where feasible. Our [Privacy Policy](/privacy-policy) provides full details.

### How long does it take for my account to be deleted?
Once you confirm deletion, the process is usually instant. Your profile and active data are removed immediately from our systems.

### What if I change my mind after deleting my account?
Account deletion is permanent. Should you wish to use BuyAndScrap.com again in the future, you will need to register for a new account.

### I can't find the 'Delete Account' option. Who can help?
If you're having trouble locating the deletion option, please [contact our friendly customer support team](/contact-us). They can assist you with the steps or process your deletion request.

We hope this guide helped you understand exactly **how do I delete my account**. If you're thinking about your next car, why not explore our range of honest, affordable cars for sale across the UK? You can also check out our [Guides](/guides) for useful advice, including how to use our [Free MOT Checker](/mot-checker).
